essence: Installs thermal and acoustic insulation in buildings to improve energy efficiency and comfort.

identity.title: Insulation Installer
identity.summary: Measures, cuts, and fits insulation materials in walls, roofs, and services, following safety and building regulations.

salary.notes: Specialist installers for high‑performance or heritage buildings can earn more.

qualifications: Experience with mineral wool, PIR, and specialist insulation systems
Understanding of building regulations and thermal performance
Good manual dexterity and attention to detail
Health and safety awareness for working at height and in confined spaces

lifestyle.description: Site work with physical tasks and exposure to varying weather; often part of refurbishment or new build projects.

habits: Measures and cuts insulation to fit
Installs insulation in walls, roofs, and services
Follows safety procedures and maintains tools
